nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: Thamnornis
nodes.summary: Thamnornis（Thamnornis，学名 Thamnornis chloropetoides），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，主要威胁包括森林砍伐。

nodes.name: 森林砍伐
nodes.summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: It often associates in family groups or with Newtonias in mixed-species flocks. While not considered threatened, its population is inferred to be decreasing due to widespread deforestation across its range. A 2019 phylogenetic study found the Thamnornis to be the sister species of Rand's warbler.{{cite bioRxiv |last1=Younger |first1=Jane L
